description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a rectangular plot, featuring a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and flat surfaces. The structure is surrounded by a green lawn and bordered by a row of evenly spaced white-leaved trees along the street-facing side. The main building is composed of white exterior walls, a flat roof, and large window openings, with a smaller attached section that may serve as a garage or auxiliary room. The property is enclosed by a low fence or wall, and the front yard includes a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private garden area, partially shielded by trees and landscaping. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood context, with adjacent sidewalk and street elements visible.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard bordered by trees and a low fence. The property features a paved walkway, private garden, and is set in a suburban neighborhood context.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a row of white-leaved trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular layout, flat roof, and the attached auxiliary section, with the street and sidewalk visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden area, back facade, and the enclosure formed by the fence and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side yard, tree line, and the relationship between the main building and the auxiliary section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
